name: Lal Bagh Palace
description: One of the most grandest buildings in the Holkar dynasty, this three-story palace is a magnificent blend of Italian Renaissance and European architectural styles.
history: Built by Maharaja Shivaji Rao Holkar between 1886 and 1921. Its main gates are replicas of those at Buckingham Palace in London.
famousFor: Ornate interiors, Buckingham Palace-style gates, and royal lifestyle exhibits.
